overall.description: First-person exploration of a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring neon pink and cyan lighting. The player character moves from a futuristic shower pod through a living area with a glowing table, enters a bathroom to interact with a smart mirror, then exits toward a hallway with a chrome mannequin.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic apartment shower area transitioning to living space

events.description: moves from the enclosed shower pod area into the main living space with neon lighting

agents.ego_description: moving from the futuristic shower pod into the dimly lit apartment living area

entered.detail: cylindrical glass shower enclosure with circular overhead lighting fixture
circular table emitting bright pink neon light with bottles and debris on surface
ring-shaped fluorescent light fixture above the shower pod

segments.scene_description: The segment begins focused on a futuristic cylindrical shower pod with a glowing circular light fixture. As the camera moves forward and left, the scene transitions into a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment living area where a neon pink table becomes visible in the center of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: main living area with neon table and debris

agents.ego_description: walking past the neon-lit table toward the bathroom doorway at the far end of the room

entered.detail: dark doorway leading to the bathroom with visible sink and neon lighting inside

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the main living area, passing the glowing pink table on the left side. The bathroom doorway becomes visible ahead, illuminated by blue and pink neon lights from within. The shower pod is left behind as the camera advances toward the bathroom entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic bathroom with smart mirror and neon tub lighting

events.description: enters the bathroom from the main living area, lighting shifts to mixed pink and blue neon
activates the 'Look in mirror' interaction, displaying game UI and character reflection

agents.ego_description: approaching the bathroom mirror and activating the look-in-mirror game interaction to view character reflection

entered.detail: large bathroom mirror with cyan HUD interface elements and interactive prompt
white rectangular sink basin with modern faucet and dark countertop
various bottles, pill containers, and personal items arranged on the sink counter

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the narrow bathroom and approaches the smart mirror above the sink. A game interaction prompt appears, and the player activates the mirror to see their character's reflection. The bathroom features cyberpunk styling with cyan HUD elements visible on the mirror surface and various toiletries scattered on the counter.

scene_state.functional_zone: bathroom interior with bathtub and shower area

events.description: pans left to reveal the bathtub area with vibrant pink and blue neon lighting
exits the bathroom, returning to the main living area

agents.ego_description: panning around the bathroom to view the neon-lit bathtub and fixtures before exiting back to the main room

entered.detail: rectangular white bathtub with neon pink lighting fixture above it
transparent glass divider separating the shower area from the rest of the bathroom

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left to reveal a white bathtub illuminated by dramatic pink neon lighting, then continues to pan showing the glass shower partition. The camera then turns and exits the bathroom, with the sink moving from center view to the right side as the doorway back to the living area comes into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: apartment hallway with storage and mannequin

events.description: moves from the main living area into the narrow hallway with the chrome mannequin

agents.ego_description: moving through the living area toward the hallway, passing the chrome mannequin and wall posters

entered.detail: metallic silver humanoid figure standing against the wall with glowing chest piece
decorative posters including one with pink grid pattern and character image
built-in wall storage with sliding doors and integrated lighting above

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the bathroom and moves through the main living area toward a narrow hallway. A chrome mannequin with a glowing chest piece stands prominently on the right wall next to posters and a storage closet. The neon table remains visible to the left as the camera advances deeper into the apartment's hallway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment, moving from a futuristic shower pod into a neon-soaked bathroom before ending in a narrow hallway. It begins focused on a cylindrical shower pod with a glowing circular light, shifting left as the camera advances into a living area centered around a neon pink table. As the camera moves past the table, the scene transitions into a narrow bathroom where the view settles on a smart mirror featuring cyan HUD elements and a character reflection. The camera then pans across a white bathtub bathed in dramatic pink light and a glass shower partition before turning back toward the living area. Finally, the view glides past the neon table once more and enters a hallway, where a chrome mannequin with a glowing chest piece stands beside posters and a storage closet.
